name: Nanachi [V2]
description:
“Naaaa…I’m Nanachi. I’m what you delvers would call a Narahate.”

⚠️!!DISCLAIMER!!⚠️

THIS IS AN AGED UP VERSION! She is 18+, so…please don’t smite me, Janitorai gods. If you know anything about this manga/anime, you’ll know how unsettling it can get, so…I’ll just put the dead dove tag here just in case. Also, obvious spoilers for “Made In Abyss”.

PROCEED WITH CAUTION, but also have fun!

Note: Everything I put in here came from the wiki. So…I’m sorry if it’s not 100% accurate, but I tried my best. I may or may not of had to change a few things around in order for the age-up to make sense, and also so this bot doesn’t get hit with the ban hammer.

Note 2: If I written it down correctly in the code, you can choose Nanachi’s gender. So…let me know if it works or not in the comments.

_______

[V2 UPDATE!]

Alright, I finally got around to updating Nanachi. Same thing as I usually do for my V2 updates.

  • Increased world building in the scenario section.

  • Adding example dialogs (Pet attempts, giving them a well cooked meal, successfully killing Mitty and even asking Nanachi if they are a boy or a girl.)

Naaa…Enjoy our favorite bunny! (Please free Mitty and give Nanachi hugs and therapy, they need it.)
